# MBA Guidance

> MBA Guidance is an independent MBA admissions resource covering 150 business school programs. The site provides acceptance rates, GMAT scores, salary outcomes, and honest program verdicts written by a Berkeley Haas MBA graduate. Content includes school-by-school profiles with application deadlines and essay guides, head-to-head program comparisons, specialty rankings across 25 categories, admissions strategy guides, an ROI calculator, and a GMAT target score calculator. 2026 data.

## Core Pages
- [Homepage](https://mbaguidance.com/)
- [All Schools](https://mbaguidance.com/schools/): 150 MBA program profiles
- [Compare Programs](https://mbaguidance.com/compare/): Side-by-side school comparisons
- [Guides](https://mbaguidance.com/guides/): Admissions strategy and career guides
- [Blog](https://mbaguidance.com/blog/): "Is [School] Worth It?" analyses
- [Newsletter](https://mbaguidance.com/newsletter/)

## School Profiles (M7 + Top Programs)
- [Stanford GSB](https://mbaguidance.com/schools/stanford-gsb/)
- [Harvard Business School](https://mbaguidance.com/schools/harvard-business-school/)
- [Wharton](https://mbaguidance.com/schools/wharton/)
- [Booth](https://mbaguidance.com/schools/booth/)
- [Kellogg](https://mbaguidance.com/schools/kellogg/)
- [Columbia Business School](https://mbaguidance.com/schools/columbia-business-school/)
- [MIT Sloan](https://mbaguidance.com/schools/mit-sloan/)
- [Berkeley Haas](https://mbaguidance.com/schools/berkeley-haas/)
- [Yale SOM](https://mbaguidance.com/schools/yale-som/)
- [NYU Stern](https://mbaguidance.com/schools/nyu-stern/)
- [Duke Fuqua](https://mbaguidance.com/schools/duke-fuqua/)

Each school profile includes sub-pages: /acceptance-rate/, /class-profile/, /deadlines/, /essays/, /interview/, /employment/
